member.name: M:Core.Application.Abstractions.IInvestmentCaseRepository.GetScopedForTransitionAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Scoped load for workflow transitions (minimal graph, avoids spurious parent updates).

member.name: F:Core.Application.Identity.Authorization.RolePermissions.AllPermissions
member.summary: Every API permission string — assigned to .

member.name: T:Core.Application.Kanban.CaseKanbanRules
member.summary: Role/status ownership for the kanban board. Keep aligned with CaseStateManager transitions.

member.name: T:Core.Application.Logging.ApplicationLog
member.summary: Shared structured Information logs for application and infrastructure use cases (not a DI service). Pattern per operation: → optional on expected denials → on success. Controllers stay thin; do not duplicate these messages at the API layer.

member.name: M:Core.Application.Services.InvestmentCaseAppService.UploadPreliminaryContractAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Legacy entry point when only is known. Prefer presign → PUT storage → .

member.name: M:Core.Application.Services.InvestmentCaseAppService.UploadSignedContractAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Legacy entry point when only is known. Prefer presign → PUT storage → .

member.name: M:Core.Application.Services.InvestmentCaseAppService.CompleteDocumentConfirmAsync(System.Guid,Core.Domain.Entities.CaseDocument,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: After the file is in object storage and the document row exists, optionally advance workflow for contract types.

member.name: M:Core.Application.Services.InvestmentCaseAppService.PersistCaseTransitionAsync(Core.Domain.Entities.InvestmentCase,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists status/phase via ExecuteUpdate so legacy xmin/RowVersion on investment_cases cannot cause concurrency failures.

member.name: M:Core.Application.Services.InvestmentCaseAppService.GetCaseWithDocumentsForDocumentWriteAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Read-only load for document presign/confirm. Avoids tracking so saving a new does not UPDATE the parent row (legacy xmin concurrency on investment_cases).
